rules.rule_text:
rule db_connection
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$a = /\b(mongodb|http|https|ftp|mysql|postgresql|oracle):\/\/(\S*):(\S*)@(\S*)\b/
		$n1 = "#EXTINF"
		$n2 = "m3u8"

	condition:
		$a and not any of ( $n* )
}
